steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence: "However, many of the fossil studies have relied on incomplete data sets." The skill is rhetorical purpose. The decisive clue is the word "However," which signals a limitation being introduced after fossil studies were described as pointing to a different conclusion than genetic studies.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — It offers an overview of the tools scientists use to examine fossils.: The sentence mentions data sets, not tools or techniques used in fossil examination. ✗
  • Choice B — It describes a limitation of some studies about the origin of turtles.: The sentence says fossil studies "relied on incomplete data sets," which is a direct statement of their limitation regarding turtle origins. ✓
  • Choice C — It summarizes previous research on the evolution of crocodiles.: The sentence says nothing about crocodiles; it addresses data quality in fossil studies. ✗
  • Choice D — It criticizes a widely held belief about genetic studies of reptiles.: The sentence targets fossil studies, not genetic studies, and does not characterize any belief as widely held. ✗
That matches Choice B — It describes a limitation of some studies about the origin of turtles..
